case_title: KATHLEEN EUNICE WILLIAMS VS. CONSTITUTION STATE SERVICES LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 (FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST) FILED BY WILLIAMS, KATHLEEN EUNICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTITUTION STATE SERVICES LLC ON BEHALF OF CITIGROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO DISMISS 1ST DEFENDANT - CONSTITUTION STATE SERVICES LLC & ADD A NEW DEFENDANT - CITIGROUP INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KATHLEEN EUNICE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KATHLEEN EUNICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTITUTION STATE SERVICES LLC ON BEHALF OF CITIGROUP, INC.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, KATHLEEN EUNICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (CITIBANK LIIGATION INTAKE - CITIGROUP INC) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KATHLEEN EUNICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT CITIBANK WAS REPRESENTED BY CECILIA YUEN--BRANCH MGR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
